query:
-- Update monthlyRevenue on services from their billing assignments
UPDATE services s
SET monthlyRevenue = (
  SELECT COALESCE(SUM(bi.lineAmount), 0)
  FROM service_billing_assignments sba
  JOIN billing_items bi ON sba.billingItemExternalId = bi.externalId
  WHERE sba.serviceExternalId = s.externalId
    AND bi.lineAmount > 0
)
WHERE s.externalId IN (
  SELECT DISTINCT serviceExternalId FROM service_billing_assignments
);
